title: Noba
description: A mod for Hypixel SkyBlock on modern versions of Minecraft (formerly NobaAddons)
body:
# Noba *(formerly NobaAddons)* A [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) mod for Hypixel SkyBlock on modern versions of Minecraft.
## Features - First-person item customizations - Custom chat notifications and filters - Custom command keybinds - Etherwarp overlay - Item enchantment tooltip customizations - [And many more that don't fit here](https://codeberg.org/nobaboy/NobaAddons/src/branch/main/FEATURES.md)
